allow: Bash(HF_HOME=F:/hf-cache UV_CACHE_DIR=F:/.uv-cache uv run python -c "import torch; print\(''CUDA:'', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\(''GPU:'', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else ''N/A''\); print\(''VRAM:'', torch.cuda.get_device_properties\(0\).total_memory/1e9 if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else ''N/A''\)")
